name: write_fdts
full_help:
write_fdts

Description: 
Writes flattened device tree

Syntax: 
write_fdts  [-force] [-quiet] [-verbose] <file>

Returns: 
success/failure status of applied action.

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-force]    Overwrites the existing fdts file
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <file>      fdts file (Values: A filename with alphanumeric characters and 
              .dts extention.) 

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
